message.content:
@startuml
participant "Client A" as CA
participant "Server" as S
participant "Client B" as CB

note over CA: p1 (0, 0)
note over S: p1 (0, 0)
note over CB: p1 (0, 0)

CA -> S: input: move-forward (id: 1)

note over CA: Begin movement animation
note over CA: Finish movement animation
note over S: Update Game Model\nSimulate move-forward

note over CA #cyan: p1 (0, 1)
note over S #cyan: p1 (0, 1)

CA -> S: input: move-forward (id: 2)

note over CA: Begin movement animation

S -> CA: update: game-state (ack id: 1)
S -> CB: update: game-state

note over CA: Finish movement animation
note over S: Update Game Model\nSimulate move-forward

note over CA #cyan: p1 (0, 2)
note over S #cyan: p1 (0, 2)

S -> CA: update: game-state (ack id: 2)
S -> CB: update: game-state

note over CB: Begin movement animation
note over CB: Finish movement animation
note over CB #cyan: p1 (0, 1)

@enduml
